title: Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation, Shri Amit Shah, extends warm greetings to the NCB personnel on their Raising Day
text:
Press Release:Press Information Bureau

Ministry of Home Affairs

Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation, Shri Amit Shah, extends warm greetings to the NCB personnel on their Raising Day

A premier agency dedicated to shielding our youth from drugs, NCB shoulders responsibility with deftness
NCB is advancing Modi Ji's vision of drug-free India at remarkable pace
Nation salutes their dedication and patriotism

Posted On:
17 MAR 2026 11:21AM by PIB Delhi

Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation, Shri Amit Shah, extended warm greetings to the personnel of the Narcotics Control Bureau (NCB) on the occasion of their Raising Day today.

In a post on X, Union Home Minister Shri Amit Shah, “Warm greetings to NCB personnel on their Raising Day. A premier agency dedicated to shielding our youth from drugs, NCB shoulders responsibility with deftness and is advancing Modi Ji's vision of drug-free India at remarkable pace. Nation salutes their dedication and patriotism.”



Warm greetings to NCB personnel on their Raising Day.
A premier agency dedicated to shielding our youth from drugs, NCB shoulders responsibility with deftness and is advancing Modi Ji's vision of drug-free India at remarkable pace. Nation salutes their dedication and patriotism.
— Amit Shah (@AmitShah)
March 17, 2026



****

RK/PR/PS

(Release ID: 2241031)
